name: Apical Meristem Development
description: Apical Meristem Development process visualization. This process flowchart outlines key steps, checks, and outputs.
mermaid:
graph TD
    A9[Embryonic Meristem] --> B9[Cell Division Zone]

    G9 --> H9
    H9 --> I9[Growth Continuation]
